summary: Machine-readable cross-surface conformance matrix for swarm-facing invariants that span provider streaming, tool scheduling, RPC framing, session replay/indexing, extension policy denial, and TUI frame-budget behavior.
claim_boundary: This artifact is specification-derived swarm conformance evidence only. It is not release certification, drop-in certification, live performance evidence, or permission to skip RCH, UBS, Beads, or repository quality gates.

rows.invariant: Provider streaming adapters preserve deterministic event order, partial-text accumulation, terminal usage metadata, and tool-call boundaries across native provider modules.
rows.test_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --test provider_streaming -- --nocapture

rows.invariant: Tool calls that can mutate files, append state, or spawn processes are serialized into deterministic singleton batches while read/network-only calls may share compatible batches.
rows.test_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --lib effect -- --nocapture

rows.invariant: RPC/stdin mode emits newline-delimited JSON responses and events without corrupting request IDs, command ordering, or event payload boundaries under rapid command sequences.
rows.test_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --test rpc_edge_cases rpc_multiple_commands_preserve_id_ordering -- --nocapture

rows.invariant: Session persistence, replay, branch metadata, and derived index updates remain consistent after saves, resumes, compaction-sensitive entries, and session-directory overrides.
rows.test_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --test session_conformance save_updates_session_index_for_override_dir -- --nocapture

rows.invariant: Extension hostcalls and runtime shims fail closed when policy denies filesystem, process, network, URL, or session capabilities.
rows.test_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --test extensions_policy_negative -- --nocapture

rows.invariant: Large-session TUI rendering and state snapshots expose frame-budget pressure without blocking unrelated provider, RPC, session, or tool-event progress reporting.
rows.test_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --test tui_state frame_budget -- --nocapture

negative_controls.description: The validator rejects a matrix that omits one of the required swarm surfaces.
negative_controls.test_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --test cross_surface_swarm_conformance_matrix cross_surface_swarm_matrix_negative_controls_fail_closed -- --nocapture

negative_controls.description: The validator rejects a row missing the required test_command field.
negative_controls.test_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --test cross_surface_swarm_conformance_matrix cross_surface_swarm_matrix_negative_controls_fail_closed -- --nocapture

negative_controls.description: The validator rejects a row with a status outside the machine-readable status vocabulary.
negative_controls.test_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --test cross_surface_swarm_conformance_matrix cross_surface_swarm_matrix_negative_controls_fail_closed -- --nocapture

validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo test --test cross_surface_swarm_conformance_matrix -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/codex-cross-surface/tmp cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
